content.en:
This black dragon used to be an Eternal Dao Realm, but now it has become a demon seed.

Apparently.

This is the lair of this black dragon, Ye Tian broke into the lair of the black dragon, and he would naturally be attacked by him.

However, the strength of this black dragon is not strong, and it is not as good as the previous demon seed.

Thundered!!!!!

Ye Tian continued to fight with this, and after using the Sun Prison to trap the other party, he directly took away the Nine Xuan Black Lotus.

"Gone!"

Ye Tian left here, too lazy to kill this black dragon demon seed.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to find various resources in the Demon Seed Abyss, and gradually went deep into the depths of the Demon Seed Abyss.

Here, the chance of encountering powerful demon seeds is much higher, because in the depths of the abyss of demon seeds, there is more energy suitable for demon seed cultivation, and those powerful demon seeds will naturally stay there.

It's just that occasionally the demon seed wants to break out of the abyss of the demon seed, and those powerful demon seeds will come out, but the frequency of rushing out is not high.

......

"This is the Nine Lives Mysterious Grass!"

Ye Tian saw a cyan grass somewhere in the Demon Seed Abyss, it was the Nine Lives Mysterious Grass, which was also a very good treasure, useful for the Eternal Dao Realm where the Eternal Dao Body was transformed below thirty percent.

One Nine Lives Herb is worth three hundred and nine pole points, and there are ten Nine Lives Herbs here, which is worth three thousand nine pole points!

"I have obtained so many Nine Pole Points in such a short period of time, I have earned it by blood, and it will be difficult for other Eternal Dao Realms to gather so many Nine Pole Points for a long time!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But it is also the resources of the Demon Seed Abyss, but the other Eternal Dao Realms do not dare to enter at all.

The top Eternal Dao Realm, the Eternal Dao Seed has a big problem, and he is unwilling to enter the Demon Seed Abyss, and the Eternal Dao Realm that has been transformed into the Eternal Dao Realm has no strength, so it is easy to fall.

Therefore, there are too few Eternal Dao Realms that really dare to enter.

There were no demon seeds in the vicinity, Ye Tian quickly picked these ten Nine Lives Mysterious Grass, and then left quickly.

He came to the periphery of the Demon Seed Abyss and sent these Nine Lives Mysterious Grass to another copy body, and then continued to go deep into the Demon Seed Abyss.

......

The years passed, and the years passed.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered an incomparably terrifying demon seed in the depths of the abyss of the demon seed.

Rumble!!!!!!

The demon seed sat cross-legged on a mountain peak.

When Ye Tian approached here, the other party instantly locked on Ye Tian.

At this time, Ye Tian's copy body sensed it, but it was too late to escape.

Swish!

The demon seed crossed over in an instant, and slapped one hand towards Ye Tian.

Ye Tian cast the secret technique of the Immortal Cover of the Ruin Sun, but this secret technique of the Dao Seed was like paper paste, torn apart by the other party, and then his body was penetrated and shattered by the other party.

......

"The copy body was killed, and it was killed in seconds!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The strength of this demon seed is too terrifying, it should be the kind of existence that cultivates the Eternal Dao Body to the consummation realm, and the cultivation has also reached the peak of the Eternal Dao Realm, and it has reached the extreme in all aspects.

It's a pity that in the end, it still can't escape the demon seed.

"It may be a certain lord, even if it is not a lord, its strength is comparable to that of a powerful lord!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

With his current strength, there is still a big gap between him and this kind of existence, and even if he completes the Eternal Dao Body, he is definitely not an opponent.

This kind of existence is definitely also taking the path of the strongest to the Dao, and the foundation is extremely strong, even if the Eternal Dao is a little worse, but the gap will not be too big.

The realm is enough to smooth everything!

The years passed.

Ye Tian found more and more good things, among which there were many treasures that could help him refine the Eternal Dao Body.

"Go out and practice for a while first!"

Ye Tian came out of the abyss of the demon seed.

Subsequently.

He took out some resources and traded them, including Liuhu Gold.

I saw that Ye Tian traded with a venerable Eternal Supreme Dao Realm, and they all got nine pole points.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the capital of the Agu Kingdom and met the Lord of the Agu Kingdom here.

This was also the first time Ye Tian had met the Lord of the Ao Gu Kingdom.

The Lord of the Ancient Kingdom was an old man with a thin face, and his aura was extremely terrifying, but there were wisps of rotten aura on his body, even mixed with a trace of demon seed breath.

"Sure enough, the Eternal Dao Seed of the Ancient Country Lord has a big problem, and it is not far from the Demon Seed of the Eternal Dao Seed!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

It can be said that the Lord of the Ancient Kingdom is currently in a desperate state, and unless there is an opportunity to defy the heavens, the chance of surpassing the Eternal Dao Realm is almost zero.

Now, the lord of Ogu can only say that he is just delaying time.

If you want not to be dragged down by the problem of the Eternal Dao Seed, then you can only destroy the Eternal Dao Seed by yourself, but after losing the Eternal Dao Seed, his strength has been greatly reduced, and he is naturally not qualified to serve as the Lord of the Ancient Realm.

He established the kingdom of Ogu, and he would certainly not want to let him give up the lord of Ogu.

Moreover, if he lost the Eternal Dao Seed, his strength would be so weak that it would not be as strong as the Eternal Dao Realm, which was a little stronger.

At that time, even his enemies will not let him go, and he may not even survive the next day.

Therefore, the lord of Ogu is also very distressed.

"I've seen the Lord of the Ogu Kingdom!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Take out the Liuhu gold and trade it!"

The tone of the Lord of the Ancient Nation was not very good, after all, the Eternal Dao Seed was very problematic, and it was strange that he was in a good mood.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian took out a piece of Liuhu gold, which made the Lord of the Ancient Kingdom show a hint of joy.

"You actually found twenty pieces of Liuhu gold, a total of 40,000 nine-pole points!"

"I'll transfer it to you right away!"

Soon.

Ye Tian received 40,000 nine-pole points, and the Lord of the Ancient Kingdom also received twenty pieces of Liuhu gold.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left the capital of the ancient kingdom and returned to Luoshen City.

In the following days, Ye Tian used these Nine Pole Points to buy more Xuanyang Ancient Liquid to refine his Eternal Dao Body.

Although it is difficult to transform the Eternal Dao Body, Ye Tian's perfect-level Eternal Dao Seed refining these resources, the effect of refining is also very good, and there will be no sequelae, so it is naturally a crazy cultivation.

Before you know it, tens of millions of years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Body Transformation had already been raised to the realm of three into two.

At this time, the resource of Xuanyang Ancient Liquid was of no use to him.

And although he found some resources in the Demon Seed Abyss that would help him improve his Eternal Dao Body now, he also ran out of them.

"You have to go to the Demon Seed Abyss to find resources again, otherwise the progress will be extremely slow, or even stagnant!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

So, he went to the Demon Seed Abyss again.

This time, many Eternal Dao Realms were a little curious about his arrival, after all, it was rare for the Eternal Dao Realm to enter the Demon Seed Abyss in a short period of time, which was also crazy!

Of course.

They also dare not follow.
